generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know? Many communities are already taking civil defense seriously without government overreach. Local groups are organizing neighborhood preparedness drills that actually work - no bureaucracy, just practical skills. Why spend billions on top-down systems when grassroots efforts prove we can handle this ourselves? #CommunityResilience #CivilDefense
